title: Cables and Wires
discoveryHint: You need to reach the LV age first.

sections.text: Wires carry EU between machines but suffer energy loss per block. Cables are insulated wires that do not shock players. Each material has a voltage limit, a loss-per-block value, and an amperage capacity.

Sending voltage above a wire's rating will burn it. Sending more amps than the amperage limit will also burn it. Larger wire bundles carry more amps: single (1A), double (2A), quadruple (4A), octal (8A), hex (16A).

GT6-style cables are enabled: placing cables only connects to the block you placed against. Use a Wire Cutter to open connections on other sides. GTCEu cables have native RF support at a 4:1 (RF:EU) ratio.
